canonical_definition: Psychological assessment that reveals subconscious cognitive patterns through free-relation word associations to cue words, adapted here for evaluating LLMs' cultural cognition.
papers: Reframe Your Life Story: Interactive Narrative Therapist and Innovative Moment Assessment with Large Language Models
